full_text:
He Zhi (Junsu) 何祗 (君肅)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Zhi (何祗), styledJunsu (君肅), was born in Shu. Recommended by Yang Hong as good at making plans and was promoted. Died at age 47. He Zhi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
